sections.name: History
sections.asr_prompt: Cardiology history. Chief complaint: chest pain, dyspnea, palpitations, edema. Duration, provoking factors. Risk factors: hypertension, diabetes, smoking, dyslipidemia. Family history of CAD.

sections.name: Physical Examination
sections.asr_prompt: Physical examination. General appearance, consciousness. Heart rate, blood pressure, respiratory rate, SpO2. Heart sounds, murmurs, cardiac borders. Pulmonary auscultation. Peripheral edema, peripheral pulses. Carotid auscultation.

sections.name: Investigations
sections.asr_prompt: Results. ECG: rhythm, rate, conduction, ischemia signs. Echocardiography: LVEF, chamber sizes, valves. Troponin, NT-proBNP, lipid panel, creatinine, potassium, sodium. Holter if applicable.

sections.name: Diagnosis
sections.asr_prompt: Clinical diagnosis. Primary: CAD, stable angina, CCS class. Complications: CHF with reduced LVEF. Comorbidities: hypertension stage, type 2 diabetes mellitus. ICD-10 code.

sections.name: Plan
sections.asr_prompt: Treatment plan. Medications: beta-blockers, ACE inhibitors, statins, antiplatelets. Dose adjustments. Non-pharmacologic: diet, physical activity. Follow-up timing. Referrals for further workup.
